props.name: state
props.description: Closed shows only the trigger; open reveals the content and rotates the chevron.

props.name: title
props.description: The always-visible trigger text.

props.name: onToggle
props.description: Fires when the trigger is activated; uncontrolled instances flip state closed/open themselves.

props.name: size
props.description: Avatar diameter.

props.name: overflowLabel
props.description: The +N overflow indicator text.

props.name: variant
props.description: The feedback tone being communicated.

props.name: status
props.description: Feedback tone — drives the color scheme, the leading icon, and the ARIA role (error/warning announce as alerts).

props.name: container
props.description: card = standalone with radius; section = full-bleed, square.

props.name: isDismissable
props.description: Shows the close affordance. Keep error banners until resolved.

props.name: title
props.description: Prominent header text.

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary text below the title.
props.default: Supporting detail that explains what happened and what to do next.

props.name: endContent
props.description: End-aligned action slot — typically a secondary Button.

props.name: cite
props.description: Attribution, rendered in a semantic footer.

props.name: hasSeparator
props.description: Leading separator — off for the first item in a trail.

props.name: label
props.description: The crumb text.

props.name: href
props.description: Navigation target. Current-page items conventionally point at themselves.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label for the navigation landmark.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual prominence of the action.

props.name: size
props.description: Control density.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Prevents interaction and communicates unavailability.

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a spinning busy indicator beside the label while an async action resolves.

props.name: title
props.description: Card heading, bound to the header title part on both surfaces.

props.name: actions
props.description: Constrained actions slot — only actions-grade components.

props.name: sender
props.description: Who sent it — drives the bubble color scheme.

props.name: name
props.description: Sender name shown above the message body.

props.name: avatar
props.description: Avatar beside the message.

props.name: metadata
props.description: Timestamp and delivery status below the bubble.

props.name: status
props.description: Delivery status — drives the leading icon.

props.name: timestamp
props.description: Display timestamp text.

props.name: footer
props.description: Footer content — model info, reactions, a copy affordance.

props.name: variant
props.description: Plain centered text, or text between divider lines.

props.name: message
props.description: Short factual string — a date, a join notice, a status change.

props.name: value
props.description: Checked, unchecked, or indeterminate (partial selection in a group).

props.name: size
props.description: Control size.

props.name: label
props.description: Always rendered — users must know what they are toggling.

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary text below the label.

props.name: onToggle
props.description: Fires when the box is activated; uncontrolled instances flip unchecked/checked (indeterminate resolves to checked).

props.name: variant
props.description: Label chip with the source title, or a compact numbered badge. Don't mix both in one paragraph.

props.name: sourceTitle
props.description: The source's display title (label variant).

props.name: number
props.description: Display index (number variant).

props.name: href
props.description: Source URL.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual weight of the line.

props.name: title
props.description: Primary message.

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary text explaining what will appear here and how.
props.default: When items are added they will show up in this list.

props.name: icon
props.description: Decorative icon or illustration above the title.

props.name: actions
props.description: Action buttons below the description.

props.name: isRequired
props.description: Shows the required indicator beside the label.

props.name: label
props.description: Always rendered — even custom controls need names.

props.name: inputID
props.description: The wrapped control's id, used for the label's htmlFor association.

props.name: description
props.description: Helper text between the label and the control.
props.default: Helper text for the wrapped control.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style. Ghost sits on the surface wash (transparent tokens are a documented gap).

props.name: size
props.description: Square control size.

props.name: isDisabled
props.description: Disables the button.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible name (aria-label). Be specific: "Delete conversation", not "Delete".

props.name: icon
props.description: The icon. Pass an Icon-sized element; it inherits the variant's foreground color.

props.name: gap
props.description: Space between children.

props.name: keys
props.description: The shortcut text, e.g. "⌘K".

props.name: density
props.description: Item spacing density.

props.name: label
props.description: Primary text.

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary content below the label.

props.name: startContent
props.description: Leading content — icon or avatar.

props.name: endContent
props.description: Trailing content — badge, count, chevron.

props.name: title
props.description: Heading above the list.

props.name: label
props.description: The key text.

props.name: value
props.description: The value text. Use the children slot instead for rich values.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon before the label.

props.name: variant
props.description: Numbered trail, compact page label, or dot indicators.

props.name: pageLabel
props.description: The compact variant's label text.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label for the navigation landmark.

props.name: variant
props.description: Semantic color of the fill.

props.name: value
props.description: Current progress value.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum value.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible name — screen readers must know what is progressing.

props.name: variant
props.description: Background treatment. Muted only to call attention.

props.name: state
props.description: Whether this item is the current page.

props.name: label
props.description: Item text.

props.name: href
props.description: Navigation target URL.

props.name: endContent
props.description: Trailing badge or count.

props.name: variant
props.description: The shape being previewed.

props.name: value
props.description: Current value — positions the thumb.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum value.

props.name: label
props.description: Always rendered.

props.name: label
props.description: What is loading — announced to screen readers.

props.name: gap
props.description: Space between children.

props.name: variant
props.description: Semantic color variant.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label announced by screen readers — status must never be conveyed by color alone.

props.name: value
props.description: On or off — drives the track color and thumb position.

props.name: label
props.description: Always rendered — users must know what they are toggling.

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary text below the label.

props.name: onToggle
props.description: Fires when the track is activated; uncontrolled instances flip value off/on themselves.

props.name: state
props.description: Selection state — selected tabs render semibold in the accent color.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible tab text.

props.name: endContent
props.description: Badge count or status dot after the label.

props.name: density
props.description: Vertical rhythm of the whole table; mapped into the fixed header cells.

props.name: density
props.description: Vertical rhythm, normally driven by the owning Table.

props.name: density
props.description: Vertical rhythm, normally driven by the owning Table.

props.name: state
props.description: Data state of the row.

props.name: size
props.description: Control size scale (affects padding and text size).

props.name: isRequired
props.description: Marks the field required.

props.name: label
props.description: Field label — always rendered.

props.name: description
props.description: Helper text between the label and the textarea.
props.default: Helper text that explains the expected content.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Hint shown when empty.

props.name: size
props.description: Control size scale.

props.name: isRequired
props.description: Marks the field required — shows the indicator beside the label.

props.name: isDisabled
props.description: Disabled state.

props.name: label
props.description: Field label — always rendered; placeholders are not labels.

props.name: description
props.description: Helper text between the label and the input.
props.default: Helper text that explains the expected value.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Hint shown when the field is empty. Never a substitute for the label.

props.name: type
props.description: Info confirms; error persists until dismissed (behavior layer).

props.name: endContent
props.description: Trailing content — an Undo button, a link.

props.name: color
props.description: Color variant.

props.name: size
props.description: Token size.

props.name: isDisabled
props.description: Reduces opacity and blocks interactions.

props.name: label
props.description: Text label inside the token.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon before the label.

props.name: endContent
props.description: Content after the label — a count Badge, a chevron.

props.name: size
props.description: Minimum toolbar height; children keep their own sizes.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label for the toolbar.

props.name: startContent
props.description: Start-aligned actions — buttons, segmented controls, selectors.

props.name: centerContent
props.description: Centered content.

props.name: endContent
props.description: End-aligned primary actions, selectors, badges.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label for the navigation landmark.

props.name: heading
props.description: Logo or brand at the start edge.

props.name: startContent
props.description: Primary navigation items after the heading.

props.name: endContent
props.description: Search, icons, user profile at the end edge.

props.name: state
props.description: Whether this item is the current page.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible item text.

props.name: href
props.description: Navigation target URL.

props.name: label
props.description: Primary result text.

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary text below the label.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon or avatar before the label.
